meta.title: Reverance by Otium — Invest in Batumi Real Estate
meta.description: Reverance by Otium — a premium residential investment in Batumi, Georgia. 12–15% expected ROI, sea-side location, full property management. Buy property in Georgia with high ROI.
meta.keywords: Invest in Batumi, Invest in Georgia, Batumi Real Estate Investment, Buy Property in Georgia, High ROI Property Investment

hero.title: Invest in Batumi's sea-side living.
hero.subtitle: A premium residential investment by Otium — 12–15% expected ROI, panoramic sea views, and full rental management.

items.title: Reverance by Otium
items.description: Discover a unique investment opportunity at Reverance – a premium residential complex that combines the architectural elegance of modernity, resident-oriented design, and the highest standards of living. Located in one of Batumi's most dynamically developing districts, the project is especially attractive to investors seeking stable growth and promising opportunities in Georgia's real estate market.

items.title: Batumi
items.description: Batumi is today one of the fastest-growing and most tourist-active regional markets, offering a unique opportunity for investors seeking both stable income and increasing property value.

items.title: Rooftop Infinity Pool
items.description: An infinity pool suspended above the Black Sea, open to residents all year round.

items.title: Private Wellness & Spa
items.description: Sauna, hammam, and treatment rooms — a quiet retreat steps from your door.

items.title: Concierge & Lobby
items.description: A 24-hour reception and a double-height lobby that welcomes you home.

items.title: Underground Parking
items.description: Secure resident parking with valet service and direct lift access.

items.title: Fitness Studio
items.description: A fully equipped gym with personal-training space, open day and night.

items.title: Landscaped Gardens
items.description: Sheltered courtyards and green terraces designed for quiet everyday calm.

investment.heading: A measured return on a coastal asset.
investment.intro: Batumi's tourism market is growing fast. Reverance is built to perform — for stable income today and rising value tomorrow.

reasons.title: Growing Tourism Market
reasons.description: Record visitor numbers and year-round demand make Batumi one of the region's most active rental markets.

reasons.title: Property Management Service
reasons.description: Otium manages your apartment end-to-end — bookings, maintenance, and payouts — so your return is fully passive.

reasons.title: High ROI Property Investment
reasons.description: Sea-side positioning and premium finishing keep nightly rates and resale value strong.

reasons.title: Stable, Foreign-Friendly Market
reasons.description: Foreigners can own freehold property in Georgia with low fees and a fast, transparent process.

cta.title: Get the full ROI model & investment presentation

location.heading: Two addresses, one vision.
location.subtitle: Batumi, Georgia
location.mapTitle: Reverance by Otium on the map

items.q: Can a foreigner buy property in Georgia?
items.a: Yes. Georgia allows foreign nationals to own residential property freehold, with no residency requirement and a fast, transparent registration process.
Purchase costs in Georgia are low — registration and notary fees are typically under 1% of the property value. We share a full breakdown with the investment presentation.
Yes. Our property-management service handles bookings, guest communication, cleaning, maintenance, and payouts, so your return stays fully passive.
We model a 12–15% expected annual ROI at 60–70% occupancy, based on current Batumi market rates. The full model is available on request.
Reverance is scheduled for delivery in 2026. Sales-stage pricing applies until completion.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
intro: This website, www.reverance.ge (hereinafter referred to as the "Website"), is the property of LLC MN Otium Development (identification code: 405742157) (hereinafter referred to as "we" or "us"). This page informs you about how we collect, use, and process the personal data of our website users.

We use the personal data you provide to improve our service and website. By using the Website, you agree to our processing of your personal data in accordance with the law, for the purposes specified in this Privacy Policy.

blocks.text: Our company collects data including, but not limited to:

items: Personal identification data (name, surname, email, address, phone number, etc.)

body.heading: How Do We Collect Your Data?

blocks.text: Most of the information we collect is provided directly by you. We collect and process data when you:

items: Register on our website or place an order/request
Otherwise interact with our website or services

blocks.text: This list is not exhaustive, and we may also obtain personal data from indirect sources.

body.heading: How Will We Use Your Data?

blocks.text: Our company collects your data so that we can:

items: Process your orders and manage your account
Fulfill other purposes defined in this policy

blocks.text: With your consent, we may share your data with partner companies for marketing purposes.

body.heading: How Do We Store Your Data?

blocks.text: We implement reasonable technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, use, loss, or destruction.
We retain your data in accordance with applicable law only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy. Once no longer needed, we will delete or destroy your data.

items: Request transfer of your data to another organization or directly to you

blocks.text: We will respond to all requests within 10 business days.
Cookies are small text files stored on your device. They help websites remember your preferences and usage patterns in order to improve your experience.
We may collect information automatically through cookies or similar technologies.
For more information about cookies, visit allaboutcookies.org.
